---
title: "IFCD044 Product Backlog"
categories: [ifcd044, backlog]
---


![Backlog course](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}



::: {.column-page-right}

## July 2023

| Sprint | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| #1 | 01 | 01/07/2026 |  - Cifo, Course, Teacher Introduction (2023 edition, why 100h course?) </br>  - Reference Books </br> - What is SCRUM and what is not </BR>  - SCRUM and mind (cognitive and learning): </br> (1) Intention</br> (2) Attention </br> (3) Hemispheres </br> (4) **Metacognition** </br> - Signal/Noise </br> </br> - 3 pilars SCRUM: </br> (1) Transparency </br> (2) Inspection </br> (3) Adaptation </br></br> - Class work: student's introduction and project's ideas | - [2023 edition](/ifcd044/ifcd044backlog-product.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  ![](/images/ifcd044-26/agile-2023.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> </br>  - [The Intelligence Trap](/books/theIntellingenceTrap.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Mindset](/books/mindset.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [The Righteous Mind](/books/theRighteousMind.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [The status game](/books/statusGame.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br>  - [Stolen Focus](/books/StolenFocus.png){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Getting Things Done](/books/gettingthingsdone.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [SCRUM](/books/scrum.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Mind Management Not Time Management](/books/MindManagementNotTimeManagement.jpg){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [Scrum concepts](/scrum/scrum-what-concepts.qmd){.external target='_blank'}|
|  | 02 | 02/07/2026 | - SCRUM: Manifesto </br> - What is a boycott and why? Meetings are hell! </br> - SCRUM: iteration cycle at mind, at teamwork, at AI  </br></br> - **Lateralization**: hemispheres (McGilchrist) </br></br> - Week#01: meetings, impediments and iterations </br> </br> - SCRUM cycle: plan, execute, review and retrospect </br> - SCRUM roles: Scrum Master, Product Owner, Team, Specialist</br> - Artifacts: product backlog  | - [CIA Sabotage](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xXsLu2TXqbkuL_QIFKAOkofi8eVS12Lk/view?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'}  </BR> - [Attention is All We Have](https://davidbessis.substack.com/p/attention-is-all-we-have){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Attention is all you need](https://arxiv.org/pdf/1706.03762){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [Week#01](/scrum/scrum-week1.qmd){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 03 | 03/07/2026 | - Lateralization, Attention, Salience, Metacognition and Intention </br></br> - SCRUM Guide </br> - SCRUM definition </br>  </br> - Week#01: meetings, impediments and iterations </br> </br> - Approaches Multi-Agent App I: 2 teams and defining task areas  |  - [Week#01](/scrum/scrum-week1.qmd){.external target='_blank'}   </br></br> - [SCRUM Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Manifesto](https://agilemanifesto.org/){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Metacognition](/scrum/scrum-articles-metacognition.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  |
|  |
| #2 | 04 |  06/07/2026 | - Planning Sprint#2 |  |
|  | 05 | 07/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 06 | 08/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 07 | 09/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 08 | 10/07/2026 |   |     |
|  |
| #3 | 09 |  13/07/2026 |  |  |
|  | 10 | 14/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 11 | 15/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 12 | 16/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 13 | 17/07/2026 |   |     |
|  |
| #4 | 14 |  20/07/2026 |  |  |
|  | 15 | 21/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 16 | 22/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 17 | 23/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 18 | 24/07/2026 |   |     |
: Backlog course July 2026 table {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,60,34]"}




:::
